outreachBrief.diagnosis: The Vietnamese Restaurant appears to have no meaningful website presence, which means search and referral traffic has nowhere strong to land. A simple, credible restaurant site would likely improve trust and enquiry conversion. Give the business a clearer first impression and a cleaner path to action. The biggest leak is usually unclear positioning and a weak next step.
outreachBrief.siteBrief: The Vietnamese Restaurant is a restaurant in Fortitude Valley. Lead with Vietnamese restaurant presented around one clear local advantage: Google Maps showed Facebook only / no independent website visible during Discord discovery Highlight Vietnamese restaurant, casual dining, takeaway. Keep the tone warm, editorial, inviting. The main CTA should be Message on Facebook. One design choice that should stand out is editorial photography.
outreachBrief.coldMessage: Hey The, I looked at The Vietnamese Restaurant in Fortitude Valley. Google Maps showed Facebook only / no independent website visible during Discord discovery. Noticed there is no dedicated website experience for your restaurant in Fortitude Valley, so I mocked up what a clearer first impression could look like. Happy to send the mockup if you want to see it.
followUps: Quick follow-up: the clearest gap I noticed is hero clarity. I can send over the mockup if it would help.
One more thought: nearby competitors usually do a better job showing CTA path. I already mocked up a tighter version if you want to compare it.
